description_long: This is a rectangular bar of soap with a vintage-style paper wrapper featuring Russian text and colorful illustrations. The front face displays a drawing of a man riding an elephant, domed buildings, and bold Cyrillic script in red and black. The sides of the wrapper are decorated with a repeating blue floral motif bordered by yellow lines, and additional Russian text is visible. The back face contains a block of red Cyrillic text, likely describing the product or its benefits. The top and bottom surfaces are similarly adorned with the floral border and a circular emblem. The wrapper appears slightly aged but intact, and the soap inside is likely a solid, off-white bar.
description: A rectangular, vintage-wrapped bar of soap with Russian text, blue floral borders, and a colorful illustration of a man on an elephant.
description_view_0: The side view shows the blue floral border and faint Russian text on a cream background.
description_view_1: The front view features a colorful illustration of a man on an elephant, domed buildings, and bold Russian text.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the blue floral border and more Russian text, similar to view 0.
description_view_3: The back view presents a large block of red Russian text on a yellowed background, bordered by the floral motif.
attribute_packaging_design: Rectangular bar wrapped in vintage-style paper with blue floral borders, Russian text, and a colorful illustration of a man on an elephant with domed buildings.
attribute_label_text: Чай – полезный, хорошо утоляющий жажду напиток, – содержит вещества, расширяющие и укрепляющие сосуды мозга и сердца, стимулирует умственную и физическую работоспособность, благотворно влияет на общий обмен веществ в организме.
